title: Desert Scourge
description: Adds new unique boss in desert, based on Calamity Mod
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb5af077caa95c1cc9ed19b4f9a3812b82a7a5f8.png)

# ❔ About
This datapack adds a new unique worm boss, based on the boss of the same name from Calamity Mod.  

# 💿 Installation
This datapack is installed like any other.  
- Don’t forget to install and enable the resource pack.  
- ~~Datapack requires enabled “Bundles” in Experiments.~~ (not relevant since v1.2)  

# 🏜️ Content
## 💰 Bundle
- Bundle now has a craft.  
![Bundle, craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13f46bfe7aabb7d7cac47e95d4ffd5e17eb52e3b.png)

## 🌪️ Sand Tornado
![Sand Tornado](https://i.imgur.com/0rshZq5.gif)  
- Sand Tornado spawns in the desert and chases the nearest player, throwing them into the sky. The spawn chance is much higher in rainy weather.  
![Bag of Winds, craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74d19bc5ad21d4c4b224b33b3ecbd2e5ea1f7465.png)  
![Suspicious Horn, craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fe0f6549df3dacdb18ffe694c4800e4a18aeea0.png)  
  - Mod used - [Legendary Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-tooltips)

## 🪱 Desert Scourge
![Desert Scourge](https://i.imgur.com/Wr80qx4.gif)  
- Desert Scourge is a unique boss worm that can be summoned using the Suspicious Horn in the desert.
- Has 250 HP. It attacks both directly, attacking the player from underground, and indirectly, summoning its mini-worm minions, which jump out from underground and attack random players.
- Аfter its death, it drops a new item on place of his head - the Barinade.  
![Barinade, obtaining](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db0e6367fbff98a1d96d589fc3e8d4acae161791.png)  
- Barinade is a bow whose arrows have no gravity and have great speed.
  - Arrows that hit the block disappear.

# 🎬 Showcase
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/etqSvW8f-_s" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# 🛠️ Compatibility
❗~~This datapack will not work correctly on servers with Spigot/Paper.~~ (not relevant since v1.1)  
❗This datapack may have problems with other datapacks/mods that somehow change pigs.

# 💿 Optimization
❗The optimization here isn't the best and I **strongly don't recommend** spawning more than 1 worm.

# 👨‍💻 Authors
- Bimba - Code, Sound design  
- DotVi - Art ([Tapy.me](https://tapy.me/dotvi))

# 📨 Feedback
If you have ideas for improving the datapack (both from the content and from the technical side), please open issue on github or message me in Discord.
> Discord - @bimbusick
